faq.a2: Yes, paid plans require a payment method. Payments are processed securely via Stripe. We do not store card data.
faq.a3: Yes. All data is processed in the EU. We use Supabase (Frankfurt) and Vercel (EU region). Your uploads are not used for AI training without your explicit consent.
faq.a4: Yes, with InfluexAI Voice (powered by ElevenLabs). You may only use your own voice or licensed audio material.
faq.a5: TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn. All tools are optimized for these platforms.
faq.a6: Yes. Campaign Autopilot is built for brands and agencies. You can automatically plan complete content campaigns for 2–3 days, 7 days, or 30 days.
faq.a_agent1: Yes, in the dashboard. You enter a goal, the agent picks the right tools and creates outputs automatically.
faq.a_agent2: No. The landing page shows demos only. Real execution happens in the dashboard.
faq.a_agent3: The agent can review outputs, improve them, or create new variants. Critical workflows use quality gates.
faq.a_agent4: Credits are used for real generations and exports in the dashboard.
faq.a_agent5: Yes. Campaign Autopilot is designed for 2–3 day, 7 day, and 30 day content packages.
faq.a_sub1: Yes. INFLUEXAI is offered as a monthly or yearly subscription. Every plan includes credits you can use for our AI tools and creator modules. Monthly plans can be canceled each month.
faq.a_sub2: Yes. Monthly plans can be canceled each month. With yearly plans, your access continues until the end of the paid billing period.
faq.a_sub3: Credits are your usage balance for AI generations — for example scripts, hooks, videos, avatars, voice, or image tools. Different features consume different amounts of credits.
faq.headline: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.q2: Do I need a credit card?
faq.q4: Can I clone my own voice?
faq.q6: Can I use the AI agent for my brand?
faq.q_agent2: Does the landing page run real actions?
faq.q_agent3: What if an output doesn't fit?
faq.q_agent5: Can I create 7 or 30 days of content?
